subject: FW: Nadia apartment
body:
From: Susana Simonpietri [mailto:ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, October 31, 2007 6:10 PM
To: Lesley Groff; helen@ellmax.com; nadja2102@yahoo.com
Cc: Alan A. Barr; Mark L. Zeff
Subject: Nadia apartment

 

Good evening,

 

I hope this email finds you all well.

Following up with the phone call from Helen received on Monday
requesting a revised completion date for Nadia's apartment 11E, I wanted
to inform you that I am currently unable to provide a solid date of
completion. The project development is being delayed by the contractor
provided by Anthony Barrett. For the last few months I have repeatedly
requested millwork finish samples as well as installation dates to no
avail. I believe Anthony is looking into rushing his GC to deliver, but
I am unsure as to the details. Millwork constitutes 85% of the scope of
work in the apartment and we cannot proceed without having finish
control samples submitted.

 

The furniture is in production, and has been for some weeks. They
request 12 to 13 weeks to complete these pieces. We will get a delivery
date from them by early next week.

 

The last item missing was the carpet and that is already in transit from
Europe so we could be installing it as early as next week. I will set
this up accordingly.

 

Please let me know if there is anything else I can do to help or if you
would like any more information on this matter.

Thank you so much and have a great evening.

Susana

 

 

Susana Simonpietri

ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com <mailto:ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com> 

 

zeffdesign

 

515 West 20th St, 4W

New York,  NY  10011

 

P. 212.580.7090 x238

F. 212.580.7181

www.zeffdesign.com

body_html:
From: Susana Simonpietri [mailto:ssimonpietri@zeffdesign.com]
Sent: Wednesday, October 31, 2007 6:10 PM
To: Lesley Groff; helen@ellmax.com; nadja2102@yahoo.com
Cc: Alan A. Barr; Mark L. Zeff
Subject: Nadia apartment

 

Good evening,

 

I hope this email finds you all well.

Following up with the phone call from Helen received on Monday requesting a revised completion date for Nadia’s apartment 11E, I wanted to inform you that I am currently unable to provide a solid date of completion. The project development is being delayed by the contractor provided by Anthony Barrett. For the last few months I have repeatedly requested millwork finish samples as well as installation dates to no avail. I believe Anthony is looking into rushing his GC to deliver, but I am unsure as to the details. Millwork constitutes 85% of the scope of work in the apartment and we cannot proceed without having finish control samples submitted.

 

The furniture is in production, and has been for some weeks. They request 12 to 13 weeks to complete these pieces. We will get a delivery date from them by early next week.

 

The last item missing was the carpet and that is already in transit from Europe so we could be installing it as early as next week. I will set this up accordingly.

 

Please let me know if there is anything else I can do to help or if you would like any more information on this matter.

Thank you so much and have a great evening.

Susana

 

 

Susana Simonpietri
